prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 清华大学位于北京，非本省高校，在甘 肃省无特殊地域倾斜；2025年该校在甘肃省招生约7人（占全国总招生比例约1.17%），占比极小，地域偏好影响有限；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；临床医学保持推荐热度；法学呈分化观望。甘肃省2026年普通高考考生总数约218700人，较2025 年（物理类121443+历史类58374≈179817人）增长约21.6%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次44名、2026年大幅扩 招（29→55人，+89.7%）、甘肃省考生总数显著增加（+21.6%）、清华抖音高热持续吸引关注等因素。扩招虽缓解部分竞争，但考生增量与清华持续 高热的社会关注度共同推高竞争烈度，经有限修正后预测2026年物理类最低位次约83名，区间33–133名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 37; in 2024, the minimum ranking for physics category was approximately 35; in 2025, the minimum ranking for physics category was approximately 44. In the past two years, rankings have shown a slight backward trend, with a baseline ranking of about 44 in 2025. The enrollment plan for physics category in Gansu Province: 26 in 2021, 25 in 2024, 29 in 2025, and a significant expansion to 55 in 2026, an increase of about 89.7% compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, which theoretically alleviates some competitive pressure, but as a top-tier institution, Tsinghua's popularity after expansion will remain high.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked first in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years (first from 2021 to 2026), making it the highest-level institution in the country. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving general public opinion on school management, campus safety, dormitories, and cafeterias), but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks second (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high social attention. No obvious gaps in admission records. Tsinghua University has over 40 A- or above disciplines, with representative A+ disciplines including Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, Law, Marxist Theory, etc., covering all major directions enrolled in Gansu.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Gansu Province, so there is no special regional preference. In 2025, the university enrolled about 7 students in Gansu Province (accounting for about 1.17% of the total national enrollment), a very small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact. Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be popular/highly recommended; Clinical Medicine maintains recommended popularity; Law shows differentiation and wait-and-see. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (physics category 121,443 + history category 58,374 ≈ 179,817), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 44 in 2025, significant expansion in 2026 (29→55, +89.7%), a notable increase in the total number of candidates in Gansu Province (+21.6%), and sustained high attention from Tsinghua's Douyin popularity. Although expansion alleviates some competition, the increase in candidates and Tsinghua's sustained high social attention jointly push up the intensity of competition. After limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking for physics category in 2026 is about 83, with a range of 33–133.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Clinical Medicine) (PUMC/Outstanding Physician Scientist)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Automation including Information Management and Information Systems direction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Artificial Intelligence, etc.) (Wuqiong Academy)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, etc.) (Mathematics and Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering) (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry, Biological Sciences, etc.) (Chemistry and Biology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Cross Engineering) (Ziqiang Academy/Dushi Academy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (33–133), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 33), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., 133), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety and strive for Tier 2 medium majors.
